case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) VS. ROGELIO VARGAS NARANJO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED APR-14-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NARANJO, ROGELIO VARGAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NARANJO, ROGELIO VARGAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) AS TO DEFENDANT NARANJO, ROGELIO VARGAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ROGELIO VARGAS NARANJO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
